ogTitle: Errowanbang vs Erskine Park: Climate Safety

heading: Errowanbang vs Erskine Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Errowanbang, New South Wales and Erskine Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Erskine Park has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Errowanbang (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Errowanbang or Erskine Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Errowanbang has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Erskine Park scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Errowanbang scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Erskine Park scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Errowanbang or Erskine Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Erskine Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.53% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
